channel.title: Noise on permanent-shadow
channel.description: Recent content in Noise on permanent-shadow

item.title: soggy_wavering_faith
item.description: I started a noise project this year called d3ad-l3ttuc3 and I finally made a soundcloud account and published a track! Here’s the first track made with a short wave radio, the roland p6 and the dying taun-taun synth I made. Enjoy the rambling decay… d3ad-l3ttuc3 · soggy_wavering_faith
